parameters.subject: =📊 Facebook Ads Digest - {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.run_date }} - {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.competitor_name }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fb_ads_digest_log 
    (run_date, competitor_name, ads_found, digest_sent, status)
VALUES 
    (
        CURRENT_DATE,
        '{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.competitor_name }}',
        {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.total_ads }},
        true,
        'completed'
    )
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
